text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 
21 
PRIMARY_TAXONOMY_CD 
LABEL: 
Primary Taxonomy Code for Part D Prescribers 
DESCRIPTION: This is the taxonomy code for the prescriber. This field allows researchers to better understand the 
type of provider who prescribed the medication (e.g., by knowing the type of provider and his/her 
specialty). 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PRIMARY_TAXONOMY_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
HCIdea™
